evidence: "I like most any and every thing that Danny Trejo does."
"The plot is rambling and riddled with discontinuities worsening as the episodes progress."
"The plot implied by the action is quite implausible."
"The plot is unconvincing and riddled with discontinuities."
"The best part was the CGI and the terrain. Watch it for that."
"The filming is good, with all the gore, action and gun-play you could hope for and more, the video/CGI is convincing as is the Audio (DTS-HD Master)."
"The acting, cinematography, sets, locations are all as good as the plot allows which is the problem."
"I like most any and every thing that Danny Trejo does."
"Kudos for not damaging the Predator franchise."
"The best part was the CGI and the terrain."
"The filming is good, with all the gore, action and gun-play you could hope for and more."
"The plot is unconvincing and riddled with discontinuities."
"Life is too short to waste on this."

summary: The user shows a strong preference for sci-fi and action genres, particularly enjoying works featuring Danny Trejo and the Predator franchise. They are sensitive to production quality but express mixed feelings about narrative complexity and pacing, often finding plots unconvincing and riddled with issues.
